name: Dark Bow (EOF)
detailLines: Stored Dark Bow special attack for Essence of Finality.
Requires Essence of Finality storing Dark Bow.
Uses the original Dark bow special attack profile and adrenaline cost.
No ammo is consumed on use.
description: Stored Dark bow special attack for Essence of Finality. Strikes twice for 190%-230% ability damage per hit.
